mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_login_security ( user_id, failed_login_count ) VALUES ( #{userId}, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = user_id
mapper.update: UPDATE user_login_security SET failed_login_count = 0, last_failed_at = NULL, locked_until = NULL, last_login_at = #{loginAt} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_login_security SET failed_login_count = 0, last_failed_at = NULL, locked_until = NULL WHERE user_id = #{userId}
